notes: New words are now fixed at 10 a lesson, the pace the courses are built around, and the setting you choose is your daily review limit instead: 20, 40, 60 or 100 words on top of the new ones. Croatian and Portuguese gained 234 new words so the decks carry all 250 lessons, and once you have met every word the lesson says so and turns to review only. Every em dash in the courses is gone, replaced by commas and brackets.
